message:
📖 Update SlimToolkit mission to Mint (mintoolkit/mint) v1.41.8 (#1536)

Per maintainer feedback (slimtoolkit/slim#844), updates the mission to
reflect the rebrand from SlimToolkit to Mint:

- CLI: slim → mint
- Repo: slimtoolkit/slim → mintoolkit/mint
- Install script: install-slim.sh → install-mint.sh
- Version: 1.40.11 → 1.41.8
- installMethod: kubectl → script (it's a local CLI install, not kubectl)
- Clarify that slimming runs locally/CI, not inside the cluster

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
